hero.headline:
Decide your product launch
with data, not gut feeling.
hero.description: 50 real consumers test your product for 10 days. We deliver a data-driven Go / Conditional Go / No-Go verdict report — saving you from costly launch failures.
hero.ctaSub: Limited to first 3 companies · Terms negotiable

problem.title: Is this how you decide to launch?
problem.subtitle: Most K-Beauty SMB brands face the same situation.

quotes.text: We test internally every launch, but results are inconsistent every time.
We launched a serum and got hit with 'too sticky' reviews — KRW 5M in returns.
US buyers want consumer test data, but clinical trials are way too expensive...

problem.gapInsight: By the time you realize the mistake, the point of no return has already passed.
problem.conclusion: Nadlemok fills the blind spot between consumer panels and clinical trials — a Pre-Launch verification service.

solution.title: What is Nadlemok?
solution.subtitle: The gateway that guides new products to the right path
solution.definition: We have 50-100 target consumers use your product sample for 10 days, then deliver a statistically-backed Go / Conditional Go / No-Go verdict report.

features.title: SOP-based Operations
features.desc: Standardized, repeatable tests with comparable results across runs.

features.title: Panel Tier System
features.desc: Panels matched by age, skin type, habits. History tracking prevents duplicates.

features.title: Kill Signal Detection
features.desc: Auto-detects critical flaws (irritation, stickiness, odor). 5% warning, 10% No-Go.

features.title: Full Blind + NDA
features.desc: Unbranded containers. All panelists sign NDAs with legal consequences.

process.title: Two Verification Tracks
process.subtitle: Choose what fits your situation. Both tracks start free.

steps.title: Create Project
steps.desc: Enter product name & category — instant setup

steps.title: Set Up Survey
steps.desc: Load a template or add questions manually

steps.title: Send KakaoTalk
steps.desc: Enter phone numbers → invite links sent automatically

steps.title: Collect Responses
steps.desc: Panelists click link and complete survey (1–2 days)

steps.title: View Results
steps.desc: Go / No-Go verdict + full analysis report

steps.title: Create Project + Select Panels
steps.desc: Set criteria and pick from Nadlemok's panel DB

steps.title: Set Up Survey
steps.desc: Load a template or add questions manually

steps.title: Test Period
steps.desc: Panelists use product and complete survey

steps.title: View Results
steps.desc: Go / No-Go verdict + full analysis report

process.prep: Internal: product + employee phone numbers / External: sample inventory

items.label: Go
items.criteria: No Kill Signal + Overall satisfaction ≥ 3.2 (4-point scale)
items.action: Proceed to launch with data-backed confidence.

items.label: Conditional Go
items.criteria: Minor Kill Signal or satisfaction 2.8-3.2 range

items.label: No-Go
items.action: Stopping now saves tens of millions in sunk costs.

deliverables.title: 3-Report Package
deliverables.subtitle: Not just statistics — structured documents designed for each decision stage.

reports.title: Executive Summary
items: Should we launch this product now?

reports.title: Sensory Analysis
items: Which flaws cause rejection, by what %

reports.title: Formulation Brief
items: 'Too sticky' → 'Adjust thickener ratio' — in formulation language

demoPanel.title: Panel Experience
demoPanel.subtitle: Preview the evaluation screens used by real consumer panelists.

screens.title: Panel Home
screens.desc: View active tests and progress status.

screens.title: Product Evaluation
screens.desc: Rate texture, scent, irritation on 4-point forced choice scale.

screens.title: Daily Checkpoints
screens.desc: Record changes at Day 1, 3, 7, and 14 checkpoints.

demoDashboard.title: Client Dashboard
demoDashboard.subtitle: Monitor test results in real-time on your dedicated dashboard.

tabs.title: Overview
tabs.desc: Sensory score, risk index, purchase intent at a glance.

tabs.title: Sensory Profile
tabs.desc: Radar chart of absorption, moisture, spreadability, scent, etc.

tabs.title: Kill Signal Monitor
tabs.desc: Real-time tracking of critical flaws — stickiness, scent, irritation.

tabs.title: Cohort Analysis
tabs.desc: Heatmap visualization of responses by age and skin type.

demoBanner.dashboardDesc: Experience the real-time test result dashboard built for your team.

cost.title: Before you press the production button, do this math.
cost.subtitle: Cost scenario for a single new product
cost.production: Avg. cost KRW 3,000 × 10,000 units = KRW 30M in production alone

scenarios.desc: Stop before production → Full sunk cost defense
